news.title: Broadcom (AVGO) Lands Apple Deal Worth Over $30 Billion Through 2031
news.summary: Apple and Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) have entered a multi-year chip supply agreement valued at more than US$30b. The deal runs through 2031 and covers custom silicon and wireless connectivity components for multiple Apple product generations. As part of the agreement, Apple plans to invest US$1.5b to expand and modernize Broadcom's Fort Collins, Colorado manufacturing facility.
